title: Spicy Chickpea Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with chickpeas, perfect for a quick dinner. This recipe combines the heat of peppery spices with the creaminess of gooey sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of peppery oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tsp of Dutch mustard and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the chickpeas and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the stir-fry sauce and fry sauce, and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
